requirements.name: Install and Maintain Network Security Controls
requirements.description: Network security controls protect the cardholder data environment

requirements.name: Apply Secure Configurations to All System Components
requirements.description: Malicious individuals use default passwords and settings to compromise systems

requirements.name: Protect Stored Account Data
requirements.description: Protection methods such as encryption, truncation, masking, and hashing

requirements.name: Protect Cardholder Data with Strong Cryptography During Transmission
requirements.description: Sensitive information must be encrypted during transmission over networks

requirements.name: Protect All Systems and Networks from Malicious Software
requirements.description: Anti-virus software must be used on all systems commonly affected by malware

requirements.name: Develop and Maintain Secure Systems and Software
requirements.description: Security vulnerabilities in systems and software are continuously being discovered

requirements.name: Restrict Access to System Components and Cardholder Data by Business Need to Know
requirements.description: Limit access to authorized personnel with legitimate business need

requirements.name: Identify Users and Authenticate Access to System Components
requirements.description: Assigning a unique identification to each person with access ensures accountability

requirements.name: Restrict Physical Access to Cardholder Data
requirements.description: Physical access provides the opportunity to access devices or data

requirements.name: Log and Monitor All Access to System Components and Cardholder Data
requirements.description: Logging mechanisms and ability to track user activities are critical

requirements.name: Test Security of Systems and Networks Regularly
requirements.description: Vulnerabilities are continually discovered, systems must be tested regularly

requirements.name: Support Information Security with Organizational Policies and Programs
requirements.description: Overall information security policy sets the security tone for the whole entity
